phylorefs.label: Acrobatosauria
phylorefs.scientificNameAuthorship: Buffa, Valentin and Frey, Eberhard and Steyer, Jean-Sébastien and Laurin, Michel
phylorefs.definition: The least inclusive clade containing Megalancosaurus preonensis Calzavara, Muschio and Wild, 1980 (Drepanosauromorpha) and Eudimorphodon ranzii Zambelli, 1973 (Pterosauria) but not Lagerpeton chanarensis Romer, 1971 (Lagerpetidae). This is a minimum clade definition.

hasName.label: Megalancosaurus preonensis Calzavara and Muscio and Wild, 1980
